title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN FERNANDO, MUNICIPALITY OF GUMACA PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO CAMOHAGUIN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1484 / 55 OG No. 38, 8103 (September 21, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2545, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN FERNANDO, MUNICIPALITY OF GUMACA PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO CAMOHAGUIN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio San Fernando, Municipality of Gumaca, Province of Quezon, is hereby changed to Camohaguin.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
